phrases.en: Dan turned his cell phone on.
He dialed a number on the keypad.
phrases.zh: 他在键盘上拨了一个号码。

phrases.en: And pressed the "Send" button to make the call.
phrases.zh: 然后按下“发送”键拨打电话。

phrases.en: The person did not pick up.
And found a listing for his friend Jim.
phrases.zh: 并找到了他朋友吉姆的条目。

phrases.en: Jim heard his ringtone and answered Dan's call.
phrases.zh: 吉姆听到铃声，接了丹的电话。

phrases.en: Pam selected "Text" from her phone menu.
phrases.zh: 帕姆在手机菜单里选择了“短信”。

phrases.en: She used her thumbs to press keys on the keypad.
phrases.zh: 她用拇指按键盘上的按键。

phrases.en: Many words in her message were abbreviations and symbols.
phrases.zh: 她短信里的许多词都是缩写和符号。

phrases.en: To send the message, she typed in her friend's number.
phrases.zh: 为了发送短信，她输入了朋友的号码。
